notes: Gemini re-test with B20 build. Previous tests #259/#263 had cascade failure (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED) which may have been caused by hold-never-released bug (fixed in B19). Current build has B18 CRLF fix + B19 hold fix + B20 diagnostics. gemini3 service: h2_mode=2, h2_end_stream=1, h2_hold_request=1, response_type=gemini. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용. If login is required, report 'login_required'.
